subject: Forge Atelier 1kg — 1kg capacity drum coffee roaster. Compact single-phase bench-top sample roaster for QC labs and micro-roasters. Full manual control with digital profile logging.
Forge Studio 15kg — 15kg capacity drum coffee roaster. Flagship workhorse for specialty roasters. Gas or electric, Forge Control-ready, three-phase power.
Forge Foundry 60kg — 60kg capacity production drum roaster. Heavy-duty construction, PLC-driven, afterburner standard, for established specialty roasters scaling beyond artisan volumes.
Forge 30kg Hybrid — 30kg capacity gas-plus-electric hybrid drum coffee roaster, sustainability-focused. Prototype aesthetic with clean production-ready industrial design.

Afterburner retrofit kit for 15kg Studio-class drum roaster. Compact stainless afterburner module with flanged inlet and outlet, control box with status LEDs, emission compliance for EU / West Coast US.
Heavy-duty afterburner retrofit for 60kg Foundry-class drum roaster. Large industrial stainless afterburner module with insulated ducting flanges and robust control enclosure.
Cyclone chaff collector for Studio-class drum roaster. Tall brushed-stainless cyclone body with clear viewing port, mounting bracket, flanged inlet and outlet.
Large industrial cyclone chaff collector for Foundry-class 60kg drum roaster. Tall stainless cyclone with access doors and heavy-duty mounting frame.
Calibration probe set — paired bean-temperature and exhaust-temperature thermocouple probes with braided stainless sheaths and color-coded connectors, arranged on a neutral studio backdrop.
Drum drive belt — pack of two industrial toothed rubber drive belts for drum coffee roasters, arranged overlapping on a neutral studio backdrop.
Control panel assembly v2 — PLC plus amber back-lit touchscreen plus wiring harness, mounted on a matte black enamel panel with brass accents. Clean front three-quarter view.
15kW gas burner assembly for 15kg Studio drum coffee roaster. Stainless burner tube with multiple jets, gas train with solenoid valve and ignition module.
3kW electric heating element assembly for 1kg Atelier drum coffee sample roaster. Coiled stainless element with ceramic insulator block and compact terminal housing.
60kW industrial gas burner assembly for 60kg Foundry production drum coffee roaster. Heavy stainless burner array with multi-stage gas train, safety valves, and ignition controller.
Bare welded stainless steel chassis frame for 1kg Atelier bench-top drum coffee roaster — compact square tube frame, unpainted, brushed-steel finish, structural sub-assembly.
Bare welded stainless steel chassis frame for 15kg Studio drum coffee roaster — floor-standing rectangular square-tube frame, unpainted, brushed-steel finish, structural sub-assembly.
Bare welded stainless steel heavy-duty chassis frame for 60kg Foundry production drum coffee roaster — large floor-standing square-tube frame, structural sub-assembly.
Drum assembly sub-unit for 1kg Atelier sample roaster — small polished stainless cylindrical drum with cast-iron end caps and drive shaft, displayed on a neutral studio backdrop.
Drum assembly sub-unit for 15kg Studio drum coffee roaster — medium polished stainless cylindrical drum with cast-iron end caps, drive shaft, and internal vanes visible through the opening.
Drum assembly sub-unit for 60kg Foundry production drum coffee roaster — large polished stainless cylindrical drum with heavy cast-iron end caps and industrial drive shaft.
Pre-made wiring harness for 1kg Atelier drum coffee roaster — neatly bundled cable loom with color-coded leads, labeled connectors, and coiled on a neutral studio backdrop.
Pre-made wiring harness for 15kg Studio drum coffee roaster — larger bundled cable loom with color-coded leads, labeled connectors, terminal blocks, coiled on a neutral studio backdrop.
Pre-made industrial wiring harness for 60kg Foundry production drum coffee roaster — heavy cable loom with braided sleeves, labeled multi-pin connectors, coiled on a neutral backdrop.

Small ISPM-15 stamped wooden shipping crate for 1kg Atelier drum coffee roaster — plain pine crate with metal corner reinforcements, stencilled handling arrows and fragile marks on a neutral backdrop.
Medium ISPM-15 stamped wooden shipping crate for 15kg Studio drum coffee roaster — pine crate with metal corner reinforcements, stencilled handling arrows and fragile marks on a neutral backdrop.
Large heavy-duty ISPM-15 stamped wooden shipping crate for 60kg Foundry production drum coffee roaster — reinforced pine crate with metal banding and forklift pocket access on a neutral backdrop.
Forge Control — cloud roast-profile SaaS subscription. Dashboard on a laptop showing an amber-and-cream roast-curve graph, bean-temperature and exhaust traces, multi-machine fleet panel on a dark UI.
Forge Control onboarding and training — laptop on a workshop bench next to a Bean Forge roaster, the screen showing a welcome dashboard with user-setup and curve-library panels on a dark UI.

On-site installation and commissioning service — technician's hands adjusting the burner train on a freshly installed 15kg Forge Studio drum coffee roaster, with a clipboard and torque wrench on the workshop bench.
Preventative maintenance visit on a 15kg Forge Studio drum coffee roaster — technician's hands replacing a drive belt with open service panel, calibration probes and inspection sheet on a clipboard.
Preventative maintenance visit on a 60kg Forge Foundry production drum coffee roaster — technician's hands checking the afterburner, with a large industrial inspection sheet on a clipboard.
